question.label: The real version
question.name: Tell me about your week — the real version.
question.description: Kim Scott's 'care personally' made concrete. Signals that a performed answer won't cut it.

assessment.note: The answer was non-responsive and did not engage with the question's intent.

new_queue.label: Addressing negativity
new_queue.name: I've noticed some negativity in your outlook — what's behind that?

new_queue.label: Current challenges
new_queue.name: What has been the most challenging aspect of your role recently?

new_queue.label: Self-read opener
new_queue.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?

new_queue.label: Stakeholder relationships
new_queue.name: How are your interactions with doctors and administrative staff going?

new_queue.label: What they're proud of
new_queue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?

new_queue.label: Communication clarity
new_queue.name: What feedback, if any, have you received about your communication style?

new_queue.label: Growth opportunities
new_queue.name: What areas are you looking to grow or develop in over the next quarter?
